subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on Feb 8th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Feb 8th, 2026

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The party stood victorious over the carnage at the Black Ember Outpost after a daring assault.
source_quote: The party stood victorious over the carnage at the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Path of the Shadows
fact: The path forward leads down a well on the Path of the Shadows.
source_quote: The path forward, on the Path of the Shadows, was down a well

subject: hidden chest
fact: The party discovered a hidden chest in the storeroom.
source_quote: discovered a hidden chest

subject: potions of flying
fact: The hidden chest contained potions of flying.
source_quote: containing potions of flying

subject: potions of fire giant strength
fact: The hidden chest contained potions of fire giant strength.
source_quote: and fire giant strength

subject: coral gemstones
fact: The hidden chest contained coral gemstones worth a considerable sum.
source_quote: along with coral gemstones worth a considerable sum

subject: staging the scene
fact: The party decided to stage an elaborate scene inspired by a play about pretending the dead were still alive.
source_quote: decided to stage an elaborate scene inspired by a play about pretending the dead were still alive

subject: Daein's performance
fact: Daein's performance made the bodies of the fire giant and ogres appear to be merely resting.
source_quote: Daein's performance was so convincing that the bodies of the fire giant and ogres appeared to be merely resting

subject: descent into the well
fact: The party plunged into the dark, murky waters of the well.
source_quote: The party plunged into the dark, murky waters of the well

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim rode on the Owlbear's back because he was too short to navigate the five-foot depth.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Felkur—both too short to comfortably navigate the five-foot depth—riding on the Owlbear's back

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur rode on the Owlbear's back because he was too short to navigate the five-foot depth.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Felkur—both too short to comfortably navigate the five-foot depth—riding on the Owlbear's back

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear carried Bramgrim and Felkur through the tunnel.
source_quote: riding on the Owlbear's back

subject: swimming through tunnel
fact: The party swam through a tunnel for about forty feet.
source_quote: They swam through a tunnel for about forty feet

subject: Solom Ned'razak's private office
fact: The tunnel led to a large cave that served as Solom Ned'razak's private office.
source_quote: emerging into a large cave that served as Solom Ned'razak's private office

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak was a drow wizard working to subvert the power of Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra.
source_quote: the drow wizard had been working to subvert the power of Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra

subject: the Blink
fact: Solom Ned'razak developed theories about a mysterious event called the Blink.
source_quote: developed theories about a mysterious event called the Blink

subject: faerzress flicker
fact: The Blink caused all the faerzress to flicker dramatically before returning to normal.
source_quote: caused all the faerzress—a dimension-controlling substance that provides illumination and blocks teleportation—to flicker dramatically before returning to normal

subject: demons appearing
fact: Demons began appearing throughout the Underdark after the Blink.
source_quote: after which demons began appearing throughout the Underdark

subject: Solom's frustration
fact: Solom Ned'razak expressed frustration at not having conceived of the Blink himself.
source_quote: Solom's notes revealed his frustration at not having conceived of the Blink himself

subject: wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan
fact: Solom Ned'razak blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink.
source_quote: blaming powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the catastrophe

subject: failed negotiation
fact: Solom Ned'razak initially attempted to negotiate with the demons but realized they were interested only in chaos and destruction.
source_quote: He had initially attempted to negotiate with the demons but quickly realized they were interested only in chaos and destruction

subject: clerics regaining powers
fact: Lolth's clerics suddenly regained their powers after the Blink.
source_quote: Lolth's clerics, who had been mysteriously unable to commune with their goddess for some time, suddenly regained their powers after the Blink

subject: Lolth's escape
fact: Lolth used the event of the Blink to escape her imprisonment.
source_quote: because Lolth herself had used the event to escape her imprisonment

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The tunnel opened into Maerimydra, a city of fire and ash nestled in a titanic cavern six hundred feet tall.
source_quote: The tunnel finally opened into Maerimydra itself, a city of fire and ash nestled in a titanic cavern six hundred feet tall

subject: demonic control
fact: The former drow metropolis of Maerimydra is now controlled by demonic forces aligned with the demon lord Graz'zt.
source_quote: The former drow metropolis was now controlled by demonic forces aligned with the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: Graz'zt's forces
fact: The streets of Maerimydra are patrolled by fire giants, armored ogres, hellhounds, and demons of all varieties.
source_quote: its streets patrolled by fire giants, armored ogres, hellhounds, and demons of all varieties

subject: drow of Maerimydra
fact: The drow of Maerimydra have been reduced to chains and slavery.
source_quote: with drow reduced to chains and slavery

subject: western plateau
fact: The western plateau of Maerimydra bears the six-fingered symbol of Graz'zt above a courtyard.
source_quote: a western plateau bore the six-fingered symbol of Graz'zt above a courtyard

subject: eastern castle
fact: An eastern castle with towers stretching to the ceiling houses the Fire Giant Queen Hledh.
source_quote: an eastern castle with towers stretching to the ceiling housed the Fire Giant Queen Hledh

subject: southern district
fact: A massive coliseum looms in the southern district of Maerimydra.
source_quote: a massive coliseum loomed in the southern district

subject: Queen Hledh
fact: Queen Hledh is the Fire Giant Queen residing in the eastern castle.
source_quote: housed the Fire Giant Queen Hledh

subject: encounter with ogres and imp
fact: The party encountered four ogres tormenting a small creature by its barbed tail.
source_quote: the party encountered four ogres tormenting a small creature by its barbed tail

subject: imp
fact: An imp was desperately clutching a bloodstained satchel while being tormented.
source_quote: an imp desperately clutching a bloodstained satchel

subject: imp's plea
fact: The imp cried out for help, promising valuable information about the city in exchange for rescue.
source_quote: The imp cried out for help, promising valuable information about the city in exchange for rescue

subject: party decision to intervene
fact: The party decided the potential intelligence was worth the risk of intervening.
source_quote: they ultimately decided the potential intelligence was worth the risk

subject: combat with ogres
fact: Daein, Akritas, the Owlbear, and Felkur's magic made short work of the ogres.
source_quote: Daein, Akritas, the Owlbear, and Felkur's magic making short work of the ogres

subject: Pipyap
fact: The rescued imp introduced himself as Pipyap.
source_quote: The rescued imp introduced himself as Pipyap

subject: Pipyap accepting food
fact: Pipyap eagerly accepted food from the party.
source_quote: eagerly accepted food from the party

subject: Pipyap's complaint
fact: Pipyap complained about the lack of salt in the party's provisions.
source_quote: though he complained about the lack of salt in their provisions

subject: contract negotiation
fact: The party crafted a favorable agreement after rejecting Pipyap's initial contract that would have bound them to serve him.
source_quote: rejecting Pipyap's initial contract that would have bound them to serve him

subject: Pipyap's origin
fact: Pipyap revealed he had been brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake.
source_quote: Pipyap revealed he had been brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake

subject: Pipyap's avoidance of Nine Hells
fact: Pipyap exploited loopholes in his contracts to avoid returning to the Nine Hells.
source_quote: exploited loopholes in his contracts to avoid returning to the Nine Hells

subject: Pipyap's advice on Hledh
fact: Pipyap explained that Queen Hledh ruled from the eastern castle and should be avoided at all costs.
source_quote: Queen Hledh ruled from the eastern castle and should be avoided at all costs

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fiendish giant who runs the Coliseum and its betting operations.
source_quote: Veperyd, who ran the Coliseum and its betting operations

subject: unnamed fiendish giant
fact: Another fiendish giant manages the six-fingered courtyard where demons and giants worship Graz'zt.
source_quote: and another who managed the six-fingered courtyard where demons and giants worshiped Graz'zt

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a Yugoloth who lives in the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: Vraxen, a Yugoloth who lived in the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning houses a book the party needs to steal and a teleportation circle.
source_quote: the same tower that housed both the book the party needed to steal and a teleportation circle

subject: wizard from Mulmaster
fact: A wizard from Mulmaster had arrived for dinner at the residence of Vraxen.
source_quote: a wizard from Mulmaster had arrived for dinner at the residence of Vraxen

subject: party plan formulation
fact: The party formulated a plan to capture the fiendish giant from the courtyard first.
source_quote: They would first capture the fiendish giant from the courtyard

subject: plan to provoke conflict
fact: The party plans to provoke a conflict between Vraxen and Veperyd by revealing that Veperyd had been stealing from the betting pool.
source_quote: provoke a conflict between Vraxen and Veperyd by revealing that Veperyd had been stealing from the betting pool

subject: plan to steal book
fact: The party plans to steal the book while chaos erupts.
source_quote: they would steal the book

subject: plan to escape
fact: The party plans to escape through the teleportation circle before the Mulmaster wizard acquires the book.
source_quote: escape through the teleportation circle before the Mulmaster wizard could acquire it at the dinner

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Hillsfar had been controlled by Graz'zt.
source_quote: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar had been controlled by Graz'zt

subject: bluffing strategy
fact: Bramgrim suggested they could bluff their way into the tower by posing as merchants from Hillsfar or as staff.
source_quote: suggesting they could bluff their way into the tower by posing as merchants from that city or perhaps as staff

subject: deadline
fact: The party has only until nightfall to accomplish their objectives before the dinner begins.
source_quote: knowing they had only until nightfall to accomplish everything before the dinner began

fact: Daein's auditory illusion performance included the fire giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful.
source_quote: Daein's auditory illusion performance included the fire giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

fact: Akritas landed a staggering critical hit with her oath-sworn bow, dealing over 50 points of damage to the fire giant sergeant in a single strike.

fact: Akritas killed the fire giant sergeant.
source_quote: Akritas killed the fire giant sergeant

fact: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice with auditory illusions to maintain surprise.

fact: Daein claimed the human prisoner was particularly beautiful.

fact: An eastern castle in the city contains two towers.

fact: The party's goals are to acquire a demonically infused giant and secure a specific book.
source_quote: The party discussed their two main goals: acquiring a demonically infused giant and securing a specific book

subject: party strategy
fact: The party decided to prioritize getting the fiendish giant first, then provoking the war, then stealing the book.
source_quote: They decided to prioritize getting the fiendish giant first, then provoking the war, then stealing the book

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar was controlled by Graz'zt, suggesting a bluff to enter the dinner as merchants from Hillsfar or as staff.
source_quote: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar was controlled by Graz'zt, suggesting a bluff to enter the dinner as merchants from Hillsfar or as staff

subject: healing
fact: The party decided to use second wind to heal Daein and Felkur to full health before proceeding.
source_quote: The party decided to use second wind to heal Daein and Felkur to full health before proceeding

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost is a fortress built into a cave wall in the Underdark, made of polished obsidian.
source_quote: A fortress built into a cave wall in the Underdark, made of polished obsidian

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost served as a base for fire giants, ogres, and hellhounds.
source_quote: It served as a base for fire giants, ogres, and hellhounds

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The party previously cleared out the Black Ember Outpost during their assault.
source_quote: The party previously cleared it out during their assault

subject: Storeroom (Black Ember Outpost)
fact: The storeroom within the Black Ember Outpost contained a hidden chest with treasures.
source_quote: It contained a hidden chest with treasures

subject: Storeroom (Black Ember Outpost)
fact: The storeroom served as the entry point to the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: served as the entry point to the Path of Shadows

subject: Well (Black Ember Outpost)
fact: The well in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost is recognized as the entrance to the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: recognized as the entrance to the Path of Shadows

subject: descent to Maerimydra
fact: The party descended into the well to reach Maerimydra.
source_quote: The party descended into it to reach Maerimydra

subject: Path of Shadows
fact: The Path of Shadows is an underground passage of dark, murky, warm water about five feet deep.
source_quote: An underground passage of dark, murky, warm water about five feet deep

subject: Path of Shadows
fact: The passage is fed by a stream connecting to a larger lake of shadows.
source_quote: fed by a stream connecting to a larger lake of shadows

subject: Path of Shadows
fact: A five-foot-wide tunnel within the passage leads to Solom Ned'razak's private office.
source_quote: featuring a five-foot-wide tunnel that the party swam through for about 40 feet, leading to Solom Ned'razak's private office

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is a male Drow wizard.
source_quote: A male Drow wizard

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Office
fact: Solom Ned'razak's office is a private area within a large cave along the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: A private office area within a large cave along the Path of Shadows

subject: Solom's papers
fact: The office contains papers detailing Solom's research and observations about the Blink event, the faerzress, demons, and Lolth's clerics.
source_quote: containing a lamp and papers detailing Solom's research and observations about the Blink event, the faerzress, demons, and Lolth's clerics

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is a former drow metropolis now a city of fire and ash.
source_quote: A former drow metropolis now a city of fire and ash

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The city is nestled in a titanic cavern 600 feet tall at its highest point.
source_quote: nestled in a titanic cavern 600 feet tall at its highest point

subject: Demonic evil forces
fact: Maerimydra is controlled by demonic evil forces aligned with Graz'zt.
source_quote: It is controlled by demonic evil forces aligned with Graz'zt

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The city features huge buildings and plateaus 100 feet high connected by 100-foot-wide grand stairs.
source_quote: The city features huge buildings, plateaus 100 feet high connected by 100-foot-wide grand stairs

subject: Maerimydra
fact: A thick smoke layer exists above 250 feet in Maerimydra.
source_quote: a thick smoke layer above 250 feet

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The city is lit by numerous burning braziers creating a heavy charcoal scent.
source_quote: lit by numerous burning braziers creating a heavy charcoal scent

subject: Inhabitants of Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is inhabited by fire giants, ogres, hellhounds, drow slaves, and demons.
source_quote: inhabited by fire giants, ogres, hellhounds, drow slaves, and demons

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The Six-Fingered Courtyard is a courtyard on a raised plateau in the western section of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A courtyard on a raised plateau in the western section of Maerimydra

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The courtyard is surrounded by black spires bearing a prominent six-fingered symbol of Graz'zt.
source_quote: surrounded by black spires bearing a prominent six-fingered symbol (of Graz'zt)

subject: Worship at Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: Demons and giants gather at the Six-Fingered Courtyard to worship a demon lord.
source_quote: Demons and giants gather here to worship a demon lord

subject: Fiendish giant manager
fact: One of the fiendish giants manages the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: one of the fiendish giants manages it

subject: Coliseum
fact: The Coliseum is a massive structure dominating the southern end of the residential district in Maerimydra.
source_quote: A massive coliseum dominating the southern end of the residential district in Maerimydra

subject: Gladiator fights
fact: Great gladiator fights occur at the Coliseum.
source_quote: where great gladiator fights occur

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fiendish giant who is in charge of the Coliseum.
source_quote: Veperyd, a fiendish giant, is in charge of it

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd manages the betting pool at the Coliseum.
source_quote: and manages the betting pool

subject: Eastern Castle
fact: The Eastern Castle is a castle on a plateau in the eastern side of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A castle on a plateau in the eastern side of Maerimydra

subject: Eastern Castle
fact: The castle has two towers stretching from floor to ceiling.
source_quote: with two towers stretching from floor to ceiling

subject: Hledh
fact: The Fire Giant Queen Hledh resides in the Eastern Castle.
source_quote: The Fire Giant Queen Hledh resides here

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a tower in Maerimydra where Vraxen resides.
source_quote: A tower in Maerimydra where Vraxen (the Yugoloth) resides

subject: The book
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains the book the party seeks.
source_quote: It contains the book the party seeks

subject: Teleportation circle
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains a teleportation circle.
source_quote: and a teleportation circle

subject: Dinner event
fact: A dinner event is scheduled to occur at The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A dinner event is scheduled to occur here

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is a loyal companion to the party.
source_quote: A loyal companion to the party

subject: Combat at Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Owlbear participated in combat against ogres at the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: who participated in combat against ogres at the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Combat in Maerimydra
fact: The Owlbear participated in combat in Maerimydra.
source_quote: and in Maerimydra

subject: Owlbear rescue
fact: The Owlbear helped Bramgrim and Felkur stay afloat in deep water by allowing them to ride on its back.
source_quote: Helped Bramgrim and Felkur stay afloat in the deep water by allowing them to ride on its back

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: The party discovered Solom Ned'razak's private office and notes in the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: whose private office and notes were discovered by the party in the Path of Shadows

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom's writings revealed his efforts to subvert Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra.
source_quote: His writings revealed his efforts to subvert Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom's writings included theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress.
source_quote: his theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom's writings included observations on the appearance of demons.
source_quote: his observations on the appearance of demons

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom's writings included notes about Lolth's clerics regaining their powers.
source_quote: and his notes about Lolth's clerics regaining their powers

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink.
source_quote: He blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom wished the Blink had been his idea.
source_quote: and wished it had been his idea

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom initially sought accommodation with demons but realized they only caused chaos and destruction.
source_quote: He initially sought accommodation with demons but realized they only caused chaos and destruction

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is an imp with a barbed tail and a bloodstained satchel.
source_quote: An imp (devil) with a barbed tail and a bloodstained satchel

subject: Pipyap rescue
fact: The party rescued Pipyap from four ogres in Maerimydra.
source_quote: rescued by the party from four ogres in Maerimydra

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap is knowledgeable about Maerimydra's layout, inhabitants, and key figures.
source_quote: He is knowledgeable about the city's layout, inhabitants, and key figures

subject: Pipyap contract
fact: Pipyap made a contract with the party to provide information and assistance in exchange for his safety.
source_quote: He made a contract with the party to provide information and assistance in exchange for his safety

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap was brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake.
source_quote: He was brought to the prime material plane by a magic user's mistake

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap has a strong desire to avoid returning to the Nine Hells.
source_quote: having found loopholes in his previous contracts to remain free

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap complained about the lack of salt in the party's food.
source_quote: He complained about the lack of salt in the party's food

subject: Pipyap
fact: Pipyap enjoys being on the prime material plane.
source_quote: and enjoys being on the prime material plane

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is the Fire Giant Queen who rules Maerimydra.
source_quote: The Fire Giant Queen who rules Maerimydra

subject: Hledh
fact: Pipyap advises the party to stay away from Hledh.
source_quote: Pipyap advises the party to stay away from her

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fiendish giant who runs the Coliseum in Maerimydra.
source_quote: A fiendish giant who runs the Coliseum in Maerimydra

subject: Veperyd
fact: Pipyap describes Veperyd as 'a bit of an idiot'.
source_quote: Pipyap describes him as 'a bit of an idiot'

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd has been stealing money from Vraxen.
source_quote: who has been stealing money from Vraxen

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd's theft makes him a potential target for creating a distraction.
source_quote: making him a potential target for creating a distraction

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a Yugoloth who resides in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A Yugoloth who resides in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: The book
fact: Vraxen possesses the book the party is seeking.
source_quote: He possesses the book the party is seeking

subject: Vraxen and Veperyd arrangement
fact: Vraxen has a business arrangement with Veperyd regarding the Coliseum's betting pool.
source_quote: has a business arrangement with Veperyd regarding the Coliseum's betting pool

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a High Inquisitor of Mulmaster.
source_quote: A High Inquisitor of Mulmaster

subject: Veris travel
fact: Veris has travelled to attend the dinner at Vraxen's residence.
source_quote: who has travelled to attend the dinner at Vraxen's residence

subject: Veris
fact: Veris intends to acquire the book the party seeks.
source_quote: where he intends to acquire the book the party seeks

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is secretly hunting Felkur.
source_quote: Secretly hunting Felkur

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a rival buyer for the tome.
source_quote: he is a rival buyer for the tome

subject: Party deadline
fact: Veris sets the party's deadline to steal the book before the dinner concludes.
source_quote: and sets the party's deadline — they must steal the book before the dinner concludes

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt is a demon lord who controls Maerimydra and Hillsfar.
source_quote: A demon lord who controls Maerimydra and Hillsfar

subject: Graz'zt deal with giants
fact: Graz'zt made a deal with the giants to imbue them with fiendish blood.
source_quote: He made a deal with the giants to imbue them with fiendish blood

subject: Graz'zt brings in Vraxen
fact: Graz'zt brought in Vraxen to ensure his plans are carried out.
source_quote: and brought in Vraxen to ensure his plans are carried out

subject: Six-fingered symbol
fact: Graz'zt's symbol is a six-fingered hand.
source_quote: His symbol is a six-fingered hand

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The six-fingered hand symbol is prominently displayed at the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: prominently displayed at the six-fingered courtyard

subject: Worship at Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: Demons and giants worship Graz'zt at the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: where demons and giants worship him

subject: Lolth
fact: Lolth is the Drow goddess whose clerics were unable to commune with her for some time.
source_quote: The Drow goddess whose clerics were unable to commune with her for some time

subject: Lolth powers return
fact: Lolth's powers returned after 'the Blink'.
source_quote: Her powers returned after 'the Blink'

subject: Lolth escape
fact: Lolth used 'the Blink' event to escape imprisonment.
source_quote: an event she used to escape imprisonment

subject: Lolth's clerics
fact: Lolth is now reestablishing her power and organizing her clerics.
source_quote: She is now reestablishing her power, organizing her clerics

subject: Lolth's clerics
fact: Lolth is extracting revenge on those who stopped being faithful to her.
source_quote: and extracting revenge on those who stopped being faithful to her

subject: Potion of Flying
fact: A Potion of Flying was found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: A magical potion found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Potion of Fire Giant Strength
fact: A Potion of Fire Giant Strength was found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: A magical potion found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Coral Gemstones
fact: Coral Gemstones were found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: Gemstones found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Coral Gemstones
fact: The Coral Gemstones are valued at a total of 400 gold pieces.
source_quote: valued at a total of 400 gold pieces

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: Solom Ned'razak's Notes are papers found in Solom Ned'razak's private office.
source_quote: Papers found in Solom Ned'razak's private office

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: The notes contain Solom's research, theories on the 'Blink' event, observations about demons, and notes about Lolth's clerics.
source_quote: containing his research, theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress, observations about demons appearing after the Blink, his attempts to make deals with demons, and notes about Lolth's clerics regaining their powers after being silent

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: The notes included Solom's complaints about not thinking of the Blink idea himself.
source_quote: The notes also included his complaints about not thinking of the Blink idea himself

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: The notes included Solom's blame of powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan.
source_quote: and his blame of powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan

subject: Contract with Pipyap
fact: A formal agreement was negotiated between the party and the imp Pipyap, binding him to provide information and assistance without violating previous contracts.
source_quote: A formal agreement negotiated between the party and the imp Pipyap, binding him to provide information and assistance without violating previous contracts

subject: Contract terms exchange
fact: The agreement was made in exchange for Pipyap's safety and continued presence on the prime material plane.
source_quote: in exchange for his safety and continued presence on the prime material plane

subject: Contract drafting
fact: The party rejected Pipyap's initial standard contract and crafted a more favorable one using their experience from dealing with an Ultraloth.
source_quote: The party rejected Pipyap's initial standard contract and crafted a more favorable one using their experience from dealing with an Ultraloth

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass wants the party to steal a specific book from Vraxen.
source_quote: A specific book that Maram il Vass wants the party to steal from Vraxen

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The book Maram il Vass wants is located in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: located in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Book acquisition deadline
fact: The party needs to acquire the book before the Mulmaster wizard can get it at a dinner event.
source_quote: The party needs to acquire it before the Mulmaster wizard can get it at a dinner event

subject: Pipyap's Satchel
fact: Pipyap carries a bloodstained satchel with an oversized button.
source_quote: A bloodstained satchel with an oversized button, carried by the imp Pipyap

subject: Satchel defense
fact: Pipyap desperately tried to keep hold of the satchel while being tormented by ogres.
source_quote: He desperately tried to keep hold of it while being tormented by ogres

subject: Mage Hand usage
fact: Felkur used Mage Hand to tactically strip the ill-fitting uniforms off ogres during the assault on the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: Used by Felkur to tactically strip the ill-fitting uniforms off ogres during the assault on the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Mage Hand distraction
fact: Stripping the uniforms created a distraction for the fire giant sergeant and his troops.
source_quote: creating a distraction for the fire giant sergeant and his troops

subject: Fireball cast at outpost
fact: Felkur cast Fireball to initiate combat against ogres in the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: Cast by Felkur to initiate combat against ogres in the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Fireball cast at Maerimydra
fact: Felkur cast Fireball later against ogres tormenting Pipyap in Maerimydra.
source_quote: and later against ogres tormenting Pipyap in Maerimydra

subject: Fireball damage
fact: The Fireball engulfed multiple targets in an explosion of fire and dealt significant area damage.
source_quote: engulfing multiple targets in an explosion of fire and dealing significant area damage

subject: Auditory illusion of hellhound
fact: Daein used Auditory Illusions to create the vocalization of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds into distraction at the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: Used by Daein to create the vocalization of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds into distraction at the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Auditory illusion of fire giant
fact: Daein used Auditory Illusions to mimic a fire giant's voice to convince the rest of the outpost that the giants had won the battle.
source_quote: and later to mimic a fire giant's voice to convince the rest of the outpost that the giants had won the battle

subject: Illusion dialogue
fact: Daein's performance included the giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful.
source_quote: with Daein's performance including the giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians to engage in combat during the Black Ember Outpost assault.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to engage in combat during the Black Ember Outpost assault

subject: Spirit Guardians concentration loss
fact: Bramgrim waded into the fray but lost concentration after being struck by an ogre in the storeroom.
source_quote: He waded into the fray but lost concentration after being struck by an ogre in the storeroom

subject: Silence cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Silence to prevent alarms from being raised at the well in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to prevent alarms from being raised at the well in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Storeroom well
fact: The well in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost was the entrance to the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: which was the entrance to the Path of Shadows

subject: Mass Healing Word cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Mass Healing Word during the storeroom combat to provide healing to the party.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim during the storeroom combat to provide healing to the party

subject: Healing stance shift
fact: Bramgrim relented his healing-only stance after being shamed by Daein's relentless offensive.
source_quote: He relented his healing-only stance after being shamed by Daein's relentless offensive

subject: Mass Healing Word damage
fact: Bramgrim's Mass Healing Word also dealt 27 points of necrotic damage.
source_quote: also dealing 27 points of necrotic damage

subject: Hunter's Mark usage
fact: Akritas used Hunter's Mark to mark targets and enhance her attacks against ogres.
source_quote: Used by Akritas to mark targets and enhance her attacks against ogres

subject: Ogre defeat at outpost
fact: Hunter's Mark contributed to the swift defeat of ogres in the Black Ember Outpost encounter.
source_quote: contributing to their swift defeat in both the Black Ember Outpost and Maerimydra encounters

subject: Ogre defeat at Maerimydra
fact: Hunter's Mark contributed to the swift defeat of ogres in the Maerimydra encounter.
source_quote: contributing to their swift defeat in both the Black Ember Outpost and Maerimydra encounters

subject: Protective Field usage
fact: Daein used Protective Field to reduce damage from an ogre's attack.
source_quote: Used by Daein to reduce damage from an ogre's attack

subject: Protective Field damage reduction
fact: The Protective Field reduced 13 points of damage to 6 by rolling 1d8 plus 1.
source_quote: reducing 13 points of damage to 6 by rolling 1d8 plus 1

subject: Firebolt cast
fact: Felkur used the Firebolt cantrip to deliver the finishing blow to the last remaining ogre during the encounter with Pipyap in Maerimydra.
source_quote: A cantrip used by Felkur to deliver the finishing blow to the last remaining ogre during the encounter with Pipyap in Maerimydra

subject: Second Wind usage
fact: Daein and Felkur used Second Wind to restore their hit points to full health before proceeding with their mission in Maerimydra.
source_quote: Used by Daein and Felkur to restore their hit points to full health before proceeding with their mission in Maerimydra
